deliverables.title: Brand Video (Standard)
deliverables.description: A polished brand overview video for your website that communicates who CapXOS is, what you do, and why it matters. I'll handle planning, direction, filming, and post-production.

lineItems.details: Full-day shoot with multi-camera setup. Includes pre-production planning, shot list development, on-site direction, and full post-production edit of a 2-4 minute brand video.
Includes an extra hour for setup and teardown and the following lights: Aputure Nova, Aputure MC (x4), Amaran T4C, Amaran F22x + dBtx lavalier microphone packs.
Intro/outro title slides with CapXOS logo and branded lower thirds for any on-screen speakers.
Find, license and add royalty free background music that's on brand.
Edited vertical version of the brand video optimized for social media.

milestones.milestone: Pre-production: planning call, shot list, script outline
Review shot list and provide internal talking points

deliverables.title: Customer Testimonial 1 (Standard)
deliverables.description: A customer testimonial video capturing a real story from one of your customers. Includes on-site filming, custom animations to reinforce key points, and social cuts.

lineItems.details: In-person interview with 1 participant, 3 camera angles. Includes pre-interview planning, on-site direction, and full post-production edit of a 90-240 second testimonial.
Includes an extra hour for setup and teardown and the following lights: Aputure Nova, Aputure MC (x4), Amaran T4C, Amaran F22x + dBtx lavalier microphone packs.
Custom animations and B Roll to visually support key points, data, and claims shared in the testimonial.
Intro/outro title slides with CapXOS logo and a lower thirds graphic with interviewee name.
Find, license and add royalty free background music that's on brand.
Edited vertical version optimized for social media.
Shorter soundbites pulled from the testimonial, edited and optimized for social media (vertical aspect ratio).

milestones.milestone: Pre-production: identify customer, coordinate scheduling, prep interview questions
Post-production, animation, and first draft delivery
Final delivery of testimonial + social cuts

deliverables.title: Customer Testimonial 2 (Standard)
deliverables.description: A second customer testimonial video with the same scope and deliverables. Can be scheduled back-to-back with Testimonial 1 or on a separate day.

lineItems.details: In-person interview with 1 participant, 3 camera angles. Includes pre-interview planning, on-site direction, and full post-production edit of a 90-240 second testimonial.
Includes an extra hour for setup and teardown and the following lights: Aputure Nova, Aputure MC (x4), Amaran T4C, Amaran F22x + dBtx lavalier microphone packs.
Custom animations and B Roll to visually support key points, data, and claims shared in the testimonial.
Intro/outro title slides with CapXOS logo and a lower thirds graphic with interviewee name.
Find, license and add royalty free background music that's on brand.
Edited vertical version optimized for social media.
Shorter soundbites pulled from the testimonial, edited and optimized for social media (vertical aspect ratio).

Post-production, animation, and first draft delivery
Final delivery of testimonial + social cuts
